events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** — insufficient anchor bolt projection is a stop-work condition. Grouting and tensioning must not proceed until bolt length/embedment is verified against API RP 686 and corrected (replacement or extension couplings), since grouting would permanently lock in the defect and undersized projection risks inadequate preload during tensioning.
